notableEvents.label: Endy Rodríguez pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Endy Rodríguez grounds into a double play, second baseman Xavier Edwards to shortstop Otto Lopez to first baseman Liam Hicks. Jake Mangum out at 2nd. Endy Rodríguez out at 1st.
